description: Jirafe was an ecommerce analytics/events service; the remaining public materials found for this domain indicate a historical event-ingestion API on `event.jirafe.com` while the root `jirafe.com` domain is currently listed for sale.
summary: jirafe.com currently appears to expose one documented developer surface: the Jirafe Events HTTP API at `https://event.jirafe.com/v2`, described by a public Swagger/OpenAPI document and authenticated with OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
